results.title: Best Free Fonts Sites that are not Google Fonts – Open Source Alternatives
results.content:
# Best Free Fonts Sites that are not Google Fonts – Open Source Alternatives
## Johannes Ippen
1150 subscribers
524 likes

### Description
16799 views
Posted: 13 Sep 2022
Here are the best alternatives to Google Fonts – free open source font foundries that you might not know yet: [...] another really cool and really stylish type foundry is the tunera type foundry featuring more yeah quirky and unique typefaces if you are looking for something that works well on a cool poster design or that is a little bit more out of the ordinary make sure to give tunera a spin my personal favorite auntie nera is the manosk a really cool really like bulgy um playful font um and definitely a great alternative for typefaces like knee wave or even comic sans one side that i need to mention is the badass libraphones by women so this is a project by the belgium design research institute or corporation whatever and what they do is they collect typefaces that are designed and created by female designers so if you are looking for supporting female designers or if you are looking for a project [...] 27 comments
